title: Software Engineer II - Mobile (AI-Powered Consumer Experiences)
company_focus: Global marketplace for buying and selling live event tickets
description:
StubHub is on a mission to redefine the live event
experience on a global scale. Whether someone is looking to
attend their first event or their hundredth, we’re here to
delight them all the way from the moment they start looking
for a ticket until they step through the gate. The same goes
for our sellers. From fans selling a single ticket to the
promoters of a worldwide stadium tour, we want StubHub to be
the safest, most convenient way to offer a ticket to the
millions of fans who browse our platform around the world.

StubHub is seeking a Software Engineer II to join a new,
high-impact mobile engineering team building AI-powered
consumer experiences that will shape the next evolution of
our marketplace.

This team is rethinking how fans discover, evaluate, and
purchase live events through intelligent, adaptive, and
deeply personalized mobile experiences. Rather than layering
AI onto existing flows, we are building new mobile-first
interaction models powered by intelligent systems embedded
directly into our platform.

As a mobile engineer on this team, you will work closely
with product, design, backend, and AI engineers to ship
early-stage initiatives from prototype to production. You
will have meaningful ownership over user-facing experiences
used by millions of fans globally.

This is an opportunity to operate with high autonomy, move
quickly, and help define the next generation of consumer
interaction at StubHub.

Location: Hybrid (3 days in office/2 days remote) – New
York, NY



About the team:

This team sits within our Consumer App Foundations
organization and operates at the intersection of mobile
engineering, intelligent systems, and rapid experimentation.

We operate with:

- A bottom-up culture where engineers shape product direction
- High talent density and high ownership expectations
- An experimentation-first mindset
- A bias toward shipping, learning, and iterating quickly

We partner closely with AI, platform, product, and design
teams to bring intelligent mobile experiences to life.

What You'll Do:

- Design, build, test, deploy, and maintain AI-driven mobile
  features used by millions of users
- Develop high-quality mobile experiences using React Native
  and native platform capabilities
- Integrate backend and AI services into real-time mobile
  workflows
- Contribute to architectural decisions around performance,
  scalability, and maintainability
- Collaborate cross-functionally to iterate on early-stage
  product ideas
- Participate in rapid experimentation and data-driven
  iteration cycles
- Debug production issues and continuously improve mobile
  system health

You will have meaningful autonomy and accountability. Your
work will influence engagement, conversion, and revenue
across a global marketplace.

What You've Done:

- 3–5 years of professional software engineering experience
- Strong experience building and shipping production mobile
  applications (iOS, Android, or cross-platform)
- Experience integrating APIs and backend services into mobile
  applications
- Solid understanding of mobile architecture, state
  management, and performance optimization
- Experience shipping consumer-facing features at scale
- Comfortable operating in ambiguous, fast-evolving
  environments
- Proven ability to take ownership from implementation through
  production support

Nice to have:

- Experience with React Native (not required)
- Experience integrating AI or ML-powered services into mobile
  applications
- Experience building personalization or intelligent
  interaction features
- Exposure to experimentation frameworks or feature flagging
  systems
- Marketplace or high-scale consumer product experience

What We Offer:

- Accelerated Growth Environment: An environment designed for
  swift skill and knowledge enhancement, where you have the
  autonomy to lead experiments and tests on a massive scale.
- Top Tier Compensation Package: Competitive base, equity, and
  upside that tracks with your impact.
- Flexible Time Off: Enjoy unlimited Flex Time Off, giving you
  the flexibility to manage your schedule and take time to
  recharge as needed.
- Comprehensive Benefits Package: Prioritize your well-being
  with a comprehensive benefits package, featuring 401k, and
  premium Health, Vision, and Dental Insurance options.

The anticipated gross base pay range is below for this role.
Actual compensation will vary depending on factors such as a
candidate’s qualifications, skills, experience, and
competencies. Base annual salary is one component of
StubHub’s total compensation and competitive benefits
package, which includes equity, 401(k), paid time off, paid
parental leave, and comprehensive health benefits.

Salary Range

$165,000—$200,000 USD

About Us

StubHub is the world’s leading marketplace to buy and sell
tickets to any live event, anywhere. Through StubHub in
North America and viagogo, our international platform, we
service customers in 195 countries in 33 languages and 49
available currencies. With more than 300 million tickets
available annually on our platform to events around the
world -- from sports to music, comedy to dance, festivals to
theater -- StubHub offers the safest, most convenient way to
buy or sell tickets to the most memorable live experiences.
Come join our team for a front-row seat to the action.



For California Residents: California Job Applicant Privacy
Notice found here



We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity on
our team. We do not discriminate on the basis of race,
color, religion, sex, national origin, gender, sexual
orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other
legally protected status.
responsibilities: Design, build, test, deploy, and maintain AI-driven mobile features used by millions of users
Develop high-quality mobile experiences using React Native and native platform capabilities
Integrate backend and AI services into real-time mobile workflows
Contribute to architectural decisions around performance, scalability, and maintainability
Collaborate cross-functionally to iterate on early-stage product ideas
Participate in rapid experimentation and data-driven iteration cycles

use_cases: Personalized live event discovery for fans
Intelligent ticket evaluation and purchasing experiences
Adaptive mobile-first interaction models for event marketplace
Real-time personalized recommendations for live events
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a mobile engineering role that consumes AI services
built by others, not a role that builds/trains/deployes AI
models. The engineer integrates pre-built AI/ML services
into mobile applications, working alongside AI engineers who
build the actual intelligent systems.
